mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-01#Sql002 */ D.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM AS presentationFrom, D.BB_PRESENTATION_TO AS presentationTo, B.BB_URGENT_STOP AS urgentStop FROM BB_ACCEPT A INNER JOIN BB_PRODUCT_MASTER B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') INNER JOIN MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO C ON A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(C.BUTEN_CODE, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER) LEFT JOIN M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD D ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = D.PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = D.PRESENTATION_FROM WHERE A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND C.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-01#Sql003 */ NVL(H.BB_PERIOD_FROM, '00000000') AS periodFrom, NVL(H.BB_PERIOD_TO, '99999999') AS periodTo, H.PAYMENT_DATE AS paymentDate, H.PRESENTATION_DATE AS presentationDate, H.PRICE AS issueBbPrice, H.EDELIV_ONLY_FLAG AS edelivOnlyFlag, B.BB_GESTURE_VALUE AS issuePriceType, CASE WHEN D.LOTTERY_RESULT IS NOT NULL THEN D.LOTTERY_RESULT WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '2'AND A.BB_EXCLUSION = '4' THEN '4' WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '2'AND A.BB_EXCLUSION <> '4' THEN '2' ELSE A.BB_WINNING END AS lotteryResult, J.ORDER_COUNT AS quantity, DECODE(P.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, 1, TO_CHAR(P.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS edelivAgreementDate, TO_CHAR(I.READ_TIME,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS readTime FROM BB_ACCEPT A INNER JOIN BB_PRODUCT_MASTER B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD')) INNER JOIN MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO C ON A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(C.BUTEN_CODE, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER) INNER JOIN M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD H ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = H.PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = H.PRESENTATION_FROM LEFT JOIN T_IPO_PO_ORDER D ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = D.PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = D.PRESENTATION_FROM AND A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(D.BUTEN_CODE, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER) LEFT JOIN T_IPO_PO_DOCUMENT_READ I ON C.BUTEN_CODE = I.BUTEN_CODE AND C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = I.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AND A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = I.PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = I.PRESENTATION_FROM AND I.DOCUMENT_ID = '00000' AND I.VERSION_NUMBER = '000000' LEFT JOIN T_IPO_PO_EDELIV_AGRMNT P ON C.BUTEN_CODE = P.BUTEN_CODE AND C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = P.ACCOUNT_NUMBER LEFT JOIN T_IPO_PO_ORDER_DETAIL J ON J.PRODUCT_CODE = D.PRODUCT_CODE AND J.PRESENTATION_FROM = D.PRESENTATION_FROM AND J.BUTEN_CODE = D.BUTEN_CODE AND J.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = D.ACCOUNT_NUMBER WHERE CASE WHEN H.BB_PERIOD_FROM IS NULL AND H.BB_PERIOD_TO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END = 1 AND A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})
AND J.DETAIL_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.detailNumber})
SELECT NAME AS name FROM M_CODE WHERE CODE_TYPE ='38' AND CODE_1 ='01' AND CODE_2 ='END_TIME'
